ai_summary: Here's an executive summary of the document:  HUDCO has secured a landmark Memorandum of Understanding (MoU) with the Government of Bihar to extend term loans totaling Rs. 1,00,000 Crore (One Lakh Crore) over five years for urban infrastructure and Greenfield Satellite City projects, marking a substantial expansion of its lending operations. While offering significant growth potential, this colossal financing agreement introduces material risk due to the immense scale of the commitment, flexible repayment terms extending up to 25 years, and reliance on future project revenues or ring-fenced state budgets for debt servicing, which could pose long-term collection challenges.
